name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/month, inefficient manual processing causes delays in reimbursements. We automate the claims process instead of manual spreadsheets and email approvals.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual processing of expense claims leading to errors and delays.
